title: Neurotropis szowitsiana
taxonomy: Neurotropis szowitsiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It belongs to the genus Neurotropis, which is a small group of plants that are native to Central Asia. The family Apiaceae is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. Neurotropis szowitsiana is a perennial herb with a complex classification, including being in the order Apiales and the clade of core eudicots. The classification of this plant is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular phylogeny.
